◎简　　介  

　　In 2009, Cleveland police discover the bodies of 11 women on a known sex offender Anthony Sowell's property.With unprecedented access to the surviving victims, Unseen looks into how this killing spree went unnoticed for so long discussing the invisibility of women on the margins of society.
